title: Replace founder/co-founder profile photo with uploaded image

requirements.text: In frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx (or whichever component renders the founders section), locate the element at XPath /html[1]/body[1]/div[1]/div[1]/main[1]/section[5]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/div[1]/div[1]/div[2]/div[1]/img[1] and replace its src with the newly generated profile photo asset at 'frontend/public/assets/generated/founder-photo.dim_400x400.jpg'. Ensure the image renders with proper rounded/circular styling consistent with the existing founder card design.
acceptanceCriteria: The uploaded person's photo appears in the founder/co-founder profile card image slot identified by the given XPath.
The image displays with the same shape and styling (e.g., rounded or circular) as the existing profile photo placeholder.
No other profile cards or page sections are affected.

constraints: Only the specific element at the provided XPath must be changed; no other images or layout elements should be modified.
nonGoals: Changing any other section of the homepage.
Updating any other founder/co-founder card not referenced by the XPath.

edits: Crop and reframe to a professional square headshot with a clean, slightly softened background (IMG_20250724_183425_656.webp > founder-photo.dim_400x400.jpg)
